message:
Add PWA service worker with offline support

- Create sw.js with multi-strategy caching:
  - Precache essential assets (registry.json, manifest, icons)
  - Stale-while-revalidate for registry files
  - Network-first for navigation and API requests
  - Cache-first for static assets
  - Offline fallback to cached registry data
- Create useServiceWorker hook for registration and state management
- Track online/offline status for UI feedback
- Add bundles command to CLI for prompt bundles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
